T0312.title: Small-Ticket QR
T0312.definition: A small-value QR code is a collection QR code specifically used for transactions under 1,000 yuan, widely adopted in money running due to its low risk-control sensitivity.
T0312.description: To evade risk controls triggered by large transactions, criminals split illicit funds into numerous small payments. Small-value codes are the tools for receiving these fragmented funds, with single amounts typically ranging from tens to hundreds of yuan. Large numbers of small-value codes are organized on money-running platforms, where ordinary users complete collection and transfer through a task-grabbing model to wash funds, offering extreme concealment.
T0312.usageExample: Small-value codes for cashing out to USDT, Fuli escrow, high volume and stable.
